action.reasoning: Observation: Starting with empty workspace, no prior results. Analysis: Must create full pipeline from scratch for CIFAR-100-LT (long-tail imbalance). Use torchvision ResNet18 (pretrained, ~11M params <1B limit) adapted for 32x32 inputs, weighted CE loss using class_counts for imbalance, few epochs (5) for baseline+time measurement. Decision: Implement train.py (with logging to metrics.jsonl), predict.py, simple model; train briefly then submit_eval to validate and get initial balanced_accuracy + iteration timing.
